mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Board WHERE `DELETE` = 0 AND category <> 'Faq'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Board WHERE `DELETE` = 0 AND category = 'Faq'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Board(subject, writer, content, FileName, category, writeDate, `Delete`, Pwd) VALUES(#{subject}, #{writer}, #{content}, #{FileName}, #{category}, NOW(), 0, #{Pwd})
